title: The Phish Analyzer 🎣
description: Review an incident and recommend the correct IR response.

tasks.title: Categorize the Attack
tasks.description: Identify if this is Phishing, Smishing, or Vishing.

tasks.title: Contain the Breach
tasks.description: Determine the first action to protect the network.

content.problemStatement:
An employee received a text message at 3 AM from a sender named 'IT_SUPPORT' saying: 'Emergency alert! Your laptop is leaking data. Click here to run our fix tool: http://secure-corporate-fix.net/setup.exe'. 

The employee clicked the link and installed the file. 10 minutes later, the IT department noticed thousands of files being uploaded to a server in a foreign country.

**Your Mission**:
1. What type of attack is this? (Phishing, Smishing, Vishing)
2. Based on the IR Lifecycle, what is the FIRST thing you should do with that employee's laptop immediately?
